zh.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan是Dolan的女兒，於1558年出生在英國艾可。她於1581年與Thomas Abbott在英國艾可查阿培爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1612年11月16日之前在英國英格蘭艾可查阿培爾，埋葬在英國艾可查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan是Dolan的女儿，于1558年出生在英国艾可。她于1581年与Thomas Abbott在英国艾可查阿培爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1612年11月16日之前在英国英格兰艾可查阿培爾，埋葬在英国艾可查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Dolan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Aisling, Brennan, Bridgid, Cormac, Donovan, Dymphna, Eamon, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhláin ‘descendant of Dubhshlán’, a personal name from dubh ‘black’ + slán ‘challenge’.
In some cases also an American shortened form of Slovenian Dolanc or Dolanec: vernacular variants of a habitational name for someone from any of numerous villages named Dol ‘small valley’.

variants.name: Dowling
meanings: Irish (Leinster): variant of Dolan 1, or a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dúnlaing, a North Leinster name meaning ‘descendant of Dúnlang’, an early personal name. Anglicized forms can be indistinguishable from those of Ó Dubhlainn and Ó Dubhláin.
English: variant of Dolling, probably a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English word, dolling, douling ‘dull fellow’.

variants.name: Dolin
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of several places in Ukraine and Belarus called Dolina, from Slavic dolina ‘valley’.
French: metonymic occupational name for a carpenter, from a derivative of doler ‘to shave or plane’.

variants.name: Dowlin
meanings: English: variant of Dolling (see Dowling ). This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Dooling
meanings: English: variant of Dolling, a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English dolling, douling, dulling ‘dull or stupid one’. Compare Doll , Dollins , and Duling .

variants.name: Daudelin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Fernand, Gilles, Marcel, Philias, Yvon.

French: patronymic, with fused preposition d(e) ‘of’, from the personal name Audelin, from the ancient Germanic name Aldalin, a pet form of compound names based on the element ald ‘old’. This surname is very rare in France. Compare Dolan , Dolen , and Dudley .

History: This surname was (first) brought to North America by Nicolas Daudelin from Rouen in Seine-Maritime, France, who married Anne Girard in Château-Richer, QC, in 1665. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Dolan, Dolen, and Dudley.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan was born in 1558, in Essex, England as the daughter of Dolan. She married Thomas Abbott in 1581, in Chappel, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 16 November 1612, in Chappel, Essex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Chappel, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan est née en 1558, à Essex, Angleterre, fille de Dolan. Elle a épousé Thomas Abbott en 1581, à Chappel, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 16 novembre 1612, à Chappel, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Chappel, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan wurde 1558 in Essex, England, als Tochter von Dolan geboren. Sie hat 1581 in Chappel, Essex, England Thomas Abbott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 16. November 1612 in Chappel, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chappel, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan è nata il nel 1558 nel Essex, England come figlia di Dolan. Lei sposato Thomas Abbott nel 1581, nel Chappel, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 16 novembre 1612, nel Chappel, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Chappel, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Dolanは1558年にイギリスエセックスでDolanの娘として生まれた。1581年にイギリスエセックスチャップエルでThomas Abbottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1612年11月16日以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスチャップエルで死去し，イギリスエセックスチャップエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan(은)는 1558년 영국 에세스에서 Dolan의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1581년 영국 에세스 차플에서 Thomas Abbott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1612년 11월 16일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 차플에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 차플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan nasceu em 1558, em Essex, Inglaterra filha de Dolan. Ela casou-se com Thomas Abbott em 1581, em Chappel, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 16 de novembro de 1612, em Chappel, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Chappel, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan родилась в 1558 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. Её отца звали Dolan. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Abbott в 1581 г. в местности чаппел, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 16 ноябрь 1612 г. в местности чаппел, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности чаппел, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Anne Dolan nació en 1558, en Essex, Inglaterra como hija de Dolan. Se casó con Thomas Abbott en 1581, en Chappel, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 16 de noviembre de 1612, en Chappel, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Chappel, Essex, Inglaterra.
